case_title: COOPER, LOIS LEE VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS NOT FILED WITHIN THE APPLICABLE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, AND IS TIME BARRED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
